label: Bootcamp grad pivoting from teaching to early-stage startup PM

axes.edge_case: career change after 6 years in another field

resume_text:
Maya Rodriguez
maya.rodriguez@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/mayarodriguez | mayarodriguez.dev

OBJECTIVE
Product Manager role at an early-stage startup (Series A or earlier), ideally in ed-tech, healthcare, or developer tools, where I can combine 6 years of classroom-tested communication skills with new technical fluency.

EDUCATION
General Assembly Software Engineering Immersive (Mar-Sep 2024)
- Full-stack JavaScript bootcamp; built 4 capstone projects including a React + Node SaaS dashboard
B.A. Education, UC Berkeley (2018)
- Phi Beta Kappa, GPA 3.91, Highest Honors in Education thesis

EXPERIENCE
6th Grade Math Teacher, Oakland Unified School District (2018-2024)
- Designed differentiated curriculum serving 130 students per year across 4 sections
- Improved end-of-year SBAC math scores from 47th to 68th percentile over 4 years
- Led grade-level team of 8 teachers; ran weekly retros and professional development sessions
- Managed conflict resolution across student, parent, and admin stakeholders weekly

Software Engineering Intern, Tabby Health (Sep 2024 - Mar 2025)
- Built patient-onboarding flow in React + Node, reduced drop-off from 38% to 14%
- Wrote and shipped first integration tests, brought coverage from 0% to 41% in 4 months
- Worked directly with founders on product decisions; sat in on every customer call
- Drafted 6 bug-report templates that the support team still uses

Volunteer Product Lead, Estamos Listos (ed-tech nonprofit, 2023-present)
- Specced and shipped SMS-based homework reminder system for 200+ Spanish-speaking families in Oakland
- Conducted 18 user interviews to validate the feature before any code was written
- Wrote launch retro that's now the template for 2 other nonprofits using our platform

SKILLS
React, TypeScript, Node, Postgres, basic Python; user research, instructional design, classroom management, bilingual (English/Spanish)

OTHER
Certified California Math Teacher (multi-subject + mathematics); active member, Latinas in Tech Bay Area chapter
